rawAssistant: The moonwell's waters hold ancient whispers of a long-forgotten time, when Hollowfen was still young and mysterious. It's said that those attuned to its rhythms can uncover hidden truths about the creatures that roam our lands. I've spent many nights pouring over old rites and listening to the well's gentle song, seeking to understand the bond between monsters and their trainers. Tonight, as the mist lifts after last night's rain, I sense that the moonwell is stirring – perhaps it holds a message for you, dear trainer?
